name: LJ’s Juicy BBQ Salmon.
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and wash the salmon thoroughly.
2. Place the salmon on heavy-duty aluminum foil.
3. Stuff the salmon with the sliced onions, butter, salt, and pepper.
4. Smear butter on the outside of the salmon and squeeze lime juice over it as well.
5. Do not remove the skin of the salmon.
6. Sprinkle additional salt and pepper on top.
7. Wrap the salmon tightly in the foil to make it as airtight as possible (usually two layers).
8. Place the wrapped salmon on the hot BBQ for 25-30 minutes.
9. Turn the salmon over and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
10. Remove from the BBQ and serve with new mint potatoes and fresh peas. This is absolutely delicious!
